name: Foaster
long_description:
Foaster helps companies turn AI native. 

To turn an existing company AI native, the first step is to understand at a granular level how it actually works. Not how leaders think it works, but how work really gets done across teams, workflows, dependencies, bottlenecks, handoffs, and day-to-day operations. 

That is what Foaster does. Our system interviews teams across the company through 45-minute conversations, from frontline employees to leadership, and turns those conversations into a living map of the organization. 

On top of that map, Foaster shows where and how AI should be integrated, what should change first, and how the transformation should be prioritized. 

Our system keeps learning through lightweight monthly interviews, tracks progress, detects resistance, and updates its recommendations as the organization and the AI landscape evolve.

No human consultant could build this level of operational understanding at that scale, then keep it continuously updated with that degree of adaptation and personalization.

We believe every company will need a system like this. Without it, they will never truly become AI native.
